Shohoz API search-trips-v2 response (seat_class parameter values)
Wikipedia — Coaches and wagons of Bangladesh
_meta.confidence: High — these are the exact string values used in the Shohoz API
_meta.api_param_note: The 'code' field is the exact value to pass as 'seat_class' in GET /v1.0/web/bookings/search-trips-v2

seat_classes.description: Non-AC reserved seat. Most common class on intercity trains. Forward-facing seats with basic comfort.
Non-AC unreserved or lower-class seat. Basic bench seating. Cheapest class available.
AC chair class. Air-conditioned reclining seats. Premium day travel option on intercity trains.
First class non-AC seat. Better seats than Shovan Chair with more legroom. Available on select trains.
First class chair. Similar to F_SEAT on some train configurations.
AC reserved seat. Air-conditioned compartment with assigned seating. Mid-range premium option.
First class non-AC sleeping berth. For overnight journeys. Fold-down berths in cabin compartments.
AC sleeping berth. Highest comfort class. Air-conditioned sleeping cabins for overnight travel. Most expensive class.
Economy class. Very basic seating. Available on local and some mail/express trains. Lowest fare.
AC Chair class. Air-conditioned reserved seating. Equivalent to Snigdha on many trains. Available on premium intercity routes.

class_hierarchy_note: Comfort level 1 (cheapest/basic) → 5 (most expensive/luxurious): SHULOV / SHOVAN → S_CHAIR → F_SEAT / F_CHAIR / F_BERTH → AC_S / AC_CHAIR / SNIGDHA → AC_B
